description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist, boxy design. The exterior is finished in a light gray concrete or stucco, with large rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically on all sides. The front features a covered carport with two parked vehicles and a recessed entryway, while the side and rear facades have a mix of small and large windows. The property is bordered by a tiled pavement and landscaped with a few trees and shrubs. The overall aesthetic is clean and geometric, with an emphasis on horizontal and vertical lines.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and asymmetrical windows, featuring a carport and minimalist landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport with two vehicles, main entryway, and a tree on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the solid wall with minimal windows and a large tree in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a balcony, more windows, and tiled pavement with some greenery.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the carport from the side, several windows, and two small palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, integrated into a covered carport, minimal decorative elements
